mapper.select:
select ap.id, ap.policy_name, ap.target_type, ap.target_id, ap.gps_range, ap.verify_methods, ap.overtime_rule, ap.update_time,
di.dept_name
from attendance_policy ap left join dept_info di on (di.id = ap.target_id) where 1 = 1 AND target_type = 1
AND ap.policy_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{queryForm.policyName},'%')
AND di.dept_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{queryForm.deptName},'%')
order by ap.id desc

select ap.id, ap.policy_name, ap.target_type, ap.target_id, ap.gps_range, ap.verify_methods, ap.overtime_rule, ap.update_time,
di.dept_name
from attendance_policy ap left join dept_info di on (di.id = ap.target_id) where 1 = 1 AND target_type = 2
AND ap.policy_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{queryForm.policyName},'%')
AND di.dept_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{queryForm.deptName},'%')
order by ap.id desc
